subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit the Lord of the Kingdom of Names, Who, amidst the tumult of the world and the discord among nations, hath raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مالک ملکوت اسما را سزا که در بحبوحه انقلاب عالم و اختلاف امم علم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
